name: Ross Stores
analysis: ROST has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $230.2425. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at $232.2239 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry $230.2425, stop $211.0403, target $235.0192. Risk/reward is 0.25:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
